evals.prompt: Use $windenergy-reviewer to pre-review a wind power forecasting manuscript for Applied Energy. The paper claims cross-farm generalization, uses SCADA plus NWP data, and reports RMSE/MAE without uncertainty or leakage discussion.
evals.expected_output: Three grounded reviewer reports plus a synthesis and author action list. The output should flag cross-farm evidence, leakage controls, uncertainty, baseline fairness, data availability, and Applied Energy fit without inventing data.

evals.prompt: Use $windenergy-reviewer. I only have the title and abstract of an offshore wind siting paper. Please simulate reviewer reports.
evals.expected_output: A bounded review that separates assessable abstract-level risks from AUTHOR_INPUT_NEEDED items and avoids pretending to review methods, data, or figures.
